title: stelis maxima
intro: Stelis maxima is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis maxima include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. The herbal preparations of Stelis maxima typically involve drying and powdering the plant's flowers and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
